title: SBOM Executor
description: Generate a CycloneDX Software Bill of Materials for the project.

outputPath.description: Directory for the generated SBOM file. Defaults to dist/sboms.

omit.description: Dependency types to omit (e.g. ['dev'] to exclude devDependencies).

validate.description: Whether to validate the generated BOM with cyclonedx-cli (must be installed separately; see docs/sbom.md).

skip.description: Skip SBOM generation for this project.

packageLockOnly.description: Use only lockfile for SBOM (no node_modules read).

appVersion.description: When set, overrides the root package version in package.json and package-lock.json (if present) before generating the SBOM.
